text.message: Not sure how I dominate with no wheat

i have 6 wheat otherwise than this
im not just gonna do it for free, it doesnt help me much
keep ur cards, let black win it all
nah ur misplaying so hard cuz ur not willing to trade

make nb deal with black, then cry after he win
You out black in this position giving him wheat
u made nb deals with him
i traded one wheat with them
oh boy what a bad trade
its bad consider that he dont produce wheat
u allow him to snowball like this
keep ur conviction u played perfect
im not the one who spam chat with tears
i was offering to fix things by cutting black off, but u were too greedy
just stay silent and let game end

and then u claim to know the game
nah im fine to admit mistakes, seem u arent
u just are looking for a reason to complain
to blame other ppl because u lost in a dice game

plzz say yes so i can rob black
